name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
notes: This rule defines all Proxy sources on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Squid Web Proxy, Blue Coat SG Appliance, Cisco IronPort, Cisco Cloud Web Security, Forcepoint V Series, Microsoft ISA, McAfee Web Gateway
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Squid Web Proxy, Blue Coat SG Appliance, Cisco IronPort, Cisco Cloud Web Security, Forcepoint V Series, Microsoft ISA, McAfee Web Gateway
